text: To set up FlowBlinq GEO on your Shopify site, follow these steps: 1. **Access the Setup Tab**: Go to the "Setup" tab on your FlowBlinq GEO results page. 2. **Get Integration Instructions**: Click on "Get Integration Instructions" to generate the necessary code for your Shopify store. 3. **Implement Proxy Routes**: You need to set up proxy routes to serve the GEO-generated files from your domain. Here’s how: - In your Shopify admin, go to **Online Store** > **Themes**. - Click on **Actions** next to your current theme and select **Edit code**. - Add the following code to your theme's `theme.liquid` file, just before the closing `` tag: ```html ``` 4. **Add the Tracking Pixel**: This pixel helps detect AI bots visiting your site. Add the following code to your theme's `theme.liquid` file, just before the closing `` tag: ```html ``` Replace `YOUR-SLUG` with the slug provided in your integration instructions. 5. **Update robots.txt**: Ensure your `robots.txt` file allows AI crawlers to access your GEO files. You can do this by adding the following lines: ``` User-agent: GPTBot Allow: /llms.txt Allow: /llms-full.txt Allow: /.well-known/ucp.json ``` 6. **Save Changes**: After making these changes, save your files. 7. **Test Your Setup**: After implementing the above steps, you can test if everything is working correctly by running a new audit in FlowBlinq GEO. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask! You're doing great by taking these steps to enhance your site's AI visibility!
